preconditions: object must be a valid Python object or None
postconditions: list contains valid attribute names of the object
list may not be exhaustive if object uses __dir__ method
edge_cases: object is a custom class instance
object uses __dir__ method to customize attribute list

preconditions: object must be None or an instance of object
object must be an instance of type
postconditions: each string in the list is a valid attribute name of the object
edge_cases: if object is None, returns a list of built-in attribute names
if object is an instance of type, returns a list of all attribute names

groq_only: object must be a valid Python object or None
hf_only: object must be None or an instance of object
object must be an instance of type
